nasb.text: Now in those days a decree went out from Caesar Augustus, that a census be taken of all the inhabited earth.

esv.text: In those days a decree went out from Caesar Augustus that all the world should be registered.

cnv.text: 那時，有諭旨從凱撒奧古士督頒發下來，叫普天下的人登記戶口。

ccb.text: 那时，凯撒奥古斯都颁下谕旨，命罗马帝国的人民都办理户口登记。

csbs.text: 就在那些日子里，凯撒奥古斯都颁布谕令，要普天下的人都登记户口。
